languages.text: "Раз эта вещь так ценна, я предпочту оставить ее в своем владении".
"Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."
languages.original_text: "Раз эта вещь так ценна, я предпочту оставить ее в своем владении".

traits.locale_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."
"Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."
"Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

languages.text: 「その物は非常に価値があるから、私はそれを自分の所持物としておく方が良いと思う」
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: 「その物は非常に価値があるから、私はそれを自分の所持物としておく方が良いと思う。」

languages.text: «Puesto que es tan valioso, preferiría que siguiera en mis manos».
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: «Puesto que es tan valioso, preferiría que siguiera en mis manos».

languages.text: "Nachdem das Teil so wertvoll ist, würde ich es lieber behalten."
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: "Nachdem das Teil so wertvoll ist, würde ich es lieber behalten."

languages.text: « Si ce réacteur est si précieux, je préfère le conserver. »
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: « Si ce réacteur est si précieux, je préfère le conserver. »

languages.text: “既然这东西如此珍贵，我更愿意据为己有。”
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: “既然这东西如此珍贵，我更愿意据为己有。”

languages.text: "Madem bu şey bu kadar değerli, bende kalmasını tercih ederim."
languages.original_text: "Since the thing is so valuable, I would rather keep it in my possession."

traits.locale_text: "Madem bu şey bu kadar değerli, bende kalmasını tercih ederim."
